channel.title: The Modern Schoolhouse
channel.description: A K-12 education blog on school choice, teaching trends, and student success

item.title: What Parents Really Want From Schools in 2025
item.description: New surveys show 75% of parents actively considered new schools in 2025. Here's what they're looking for—and what it means for school choice.

item.title: Why Character and Rigor Both Belong in K-8
item.description: The best K-8 schools don't choose between character and academics—they prove the two reinforce each other. Here's what the research shows.

item.title: School Choice Now Pays for Therapy — Not Just Tuition
item.description: ESA programs in 20+ states now cover ABA therapy, tutoring & more — not just tuition. Here's what families of kids with disabilities need to know.

item.title: Why Students Skip School—and How to Win Them Back
item.description: Chronic absenteeism has doubled since COVID. Learn why students aren't showing up and which school strategies are actually bringing them back.

item.title: Do Online Charter Students Miss Out Socially?
item.description: Is socialization really a problem at online charter schools? Here's what the research says—and how virtual K-12 programs are building real community.

item.title: Is Online Charter School Right for Your Child?
item.description: Not every student thrives in online school. Here's an honest, research-backed guide to knowing if a virtual K-12 charter is the right fit for your family.

item.title: How Charter Schools Are Fixing the Attendance Crisis
item.description: One in four U.S. students is chronically absent. Here's how charter schools are using belonging, data, and flexible learning to turn the tide.

item.title: The Belonging Gap: Why School Size Shapes Student Success
item.description: New research links school belonging to attendance, mental health, and grades. Here's why smaller charter schools are uniquely built to close the gap.

item.title: Why Charter School Enrollment Hit a Record High in 2025
item.description: Charter school enrollment reached 3.8 million in 2025. Here's what's driving families to choose charters—and what the data really shows.

item.title: Who Fights for Charter Schools When No One's Watching?
item.description: NC charter schools hit record enrollment in 2025. Behind that growth? State associations doing the work families never see—but always benefit from.

item.title: Why Classical Charter Schools Are Booming in 2025
item.description: Classical education is one of K-12's fastest-growing models. Here's what's driving the surge, what the research shows, and what families should know.

item.title: How Charter High Schools Help At-Risk Teens Graduate
item.description: Charter high schools using accelerated, individualized learning models are helping at-risk teens graduate. Here's what the research shows and how it works.

item.title: Why Families Are Choosing Online Charter Schools
item.description: Online charter school enrollment is surging. Here's what the model actually delivers—flexibility, accredited teachers, and real college-career prep.

item.title: Early College High Schools: The Charter Model That Works
item.description: Early College High Schools give students college credits before graduation—here's what the research says and why charter schools are leading the way.

item.title: STEAM Charter Schools: Do They Deliver Real Results?
item.description: STEAM-focused charter schools are reshaping outcomes for underserved students. Here's what the research says — and what real schools are doing right.

item.title: Virtual Charter Schools Are Having a Moment
item.description: Virtual charter school enrollment is surging—and classical education is fueling the growth. Here's what families and educators need to know in 2025.

item.title: Why Early College High Schools Are Having a Moment
item.description: Early college high schools are growing fast. Here's what the research says about dual enrollment outcomes, tuition savings, and why families are choosing this model.

item.title: Why Families Are Choosing Charter Schools in Record Numbers
item.description: Charter school enrollment hit nearly 4 million in 2025. Here's what's driving the shift—and what it means for students and families.

item.title: Why More Families Are Choosing Charter Schools in 2025
item.description: Charter school enrollment hit record highs in 2025. Discover the real reasons families are choosing charters—and what it means for K-12 education.
